programs.title: Forged in Fire
programs.desc: Four talented smiths are challenged to forge a chef's knife which is then tested by a culinary expert. Later, only two go ahead to participate in the next task.

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.
